feedback.summary: G-004 SelectFilter + GlobalSearchInput + FilterResetButton verify 100/90 PASS. 16 rubric 항목 + 3 메타게이트 (F-01~F-03) 모두 무결성. tsc 0 errors + tsup OK (35.99KB CJS / 34.37KB ESM dist) + size-limit 5.08KB/20KB PASS. 3 stories (Default + ManyOptions + GlobalSearch통합) 검증 — SelectFilter 다중선택/searchThreshold/popoverAlign + GlobalSearchInput debounce 300ms + FilterResetButton disabled 조건 모두 동작. C-30 spec authority 정확 처리 (D7 vs Section 7 #8 모순 → Section 7 채택, GlobalSearchInput.stories L6 명시). TanStack 표준 API만 사용 — filterFns.arrIncludes re-export (커스텀 filterFn 0줄), table.setGlobalFilter, table.resetColumnFilters, column.getFacetedUniqueValues/setFilterValue/getIsFiltered. C-31 D3 consumer wiring 의무 (getFacetedRowModel/getFacetedUniqueValues) — SelectFilter.stories L79-80 + L156-158에 명시 등록, GlobalSearchInput.stories는 globalFilter state만 사용 (faceted 불필요). C-4 no any (Grep 0 hits), C-5 Tailwind only, C-29 spread-skip 패턴 정확 (SelectFilter.tsx L122). 호환성 vacuous truth (사용처 0개 — opt-in 신규 컴포넌트). 마이그레이션 vacuous truth (잔여 0건). 번들 5.08KB + 신규 dep 0 + MIT 라이선스. G-001/G-002/G-003 회귀 0 (filterFns.ts/types.ts/index.ts 기존 섹션 unchanged).

categoryScoresBreakdown.A: 100.0 (build 통과 — tsc 0 errors + tsup 35.99KB/34.37KB OK + size-limit 5.08KB/20KB PASS)
categoryScoresBreakdown.B: 100.0 (필터 동작 검증 — 3 stories: Default/ManyOptions/GlobalSearch통합 + Truth Table 5.1-5.3 코드 반영)
categoryScoresBreakdown.C: 100.0 (vacuous: 사용처 0개 + C-03 console/React warning 0 + G-001~G-003 회귀 0)

feedback.specC30Resolution: ACCEPTED — spec D7 ('FilterResetButton 동작은 SelectFilter story에 통합') vs Section 7 #8 ('GlobalSearchInput.stories.tsx — GlobalSearchInput + FilterResetButton 통합 story') 모순 발견. Implementer가 Section 7 권위 채택 (C-27 spec.md final authority + C-30 truth table discipline). 실측: GlobalSearchInput.stories.tsx L83-84 FilterResetButton 사용 + SelectFilter.stories.tsx L86, L167 FilterResetButton 사용 — 두 stories 모두 FilterResetButton 포함하여 D7 의도(통합 동작 확인)도 동시 충족. GlobalSearchInput.stories L6 주석에 모순 해소 명시. 이 처리는 모순 vs 권위 선택의 모범 사례 — F-02 spec.implementFiles 매칭 (Section 7) 준수 + D7 의도 양립.
feedback.regressionCheck: G-001 TextFilter (textFilterFn, TextFilter, FilterPopover, FilterIndicator) 회귀 0 — types.ts L18-94 + filterFns.ts L41-81 + index.ts L30-41 unchanged. G-002 NumberFilter (numberFilterFn, NumberFilter) 회귀 0 — types.ts L97-140 + filterFns.ts L108-165 + index.ts L43-50 unchanged. G-003 DateFilter (dateRangeFilterFn, DateFilter) 회귀 0 — types.ts L144-174 + filterFns.ts L171-241 + index.ts L52-58 unchanged.
feedback.tanStackStandardApi: ACCEPTED — TanStack v8 표준 API만 사용 (C-2 No Custom Fork): (a) filterFns.arrIncludes re-export — 내장 함수, autoRemove 자동 처리. (b) column.getFacetedUniqueValues() Map — D3 consumer wiring (getFacetedRowModel + getFacetedUniqueValues) 등록 의무. (c) column.setFilterValue(string[] | undefined) — undefined 시 autoRemove. (d) column.getFilterValue() / column.getIsFiltered() — 표준 reader. (e) table.setGlobalFilter(value | undefined) — global filter state API. (f) table.resetColumnFilters() — built-in reset. (g) table.getState() — state snapshot reader. private fields/hidden methods 접근 0.
feedback.c31ConsumerWiringAudit: ACCEPTED — D3 consumer wiring 의무 spec Section 4.2 + 6 E-1 + 12 After + spec.md L100-104에 명시. stories 검증: (a) SelectFilter.stories.tsx L79-80 `getFacetedRowModel: getFacetedRowModel(), getFacetedUniqueValues: getFacetedUniqueValues()` 등록 — Default story. (b) SelectFilter.stories.tsx L156-158 동일 등록 — ManyOptions story. (c) GlobalSearchInput.stories.tsx L66-74 useReactTable options — globalFilter state + onGlobalFilterChange 등록 (faceted 불필요 — global filter는 row-level이지 column-level이 아님). C-31 wiring audit: SelectFilter.tsx는 column.getFacetedUniqueValues() 호출 (L44) — consumer 미등록 시 빈 Map 반환 (런타임 에러 아님, spec E-1 처리). 의존성 명시 충분.
